name: technical-writing-docs
description: Technical-writing & docs team — 3 agents (docs-architect, api-reference-writer, docs-site-engineer) for developer and product documentation that people actually use: the Diataxis framework (tutorial / how-to / reference / explanation — and not mixing them), docs-as-code (docs in the repo, reviewed and CI-checked, versioned with the product), accurate API/SDK reference (spec-driven, examples that run, errors documented), and a maintainable docs site (Docusaurus/Mintlify/MkDocs, IA, search, versioning). Deepens ravenclaude-core/documentarian. 3 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (doc-type + docs-tooling trees + a dated 2026 map), 6 best-practices, 4 templates, 4 commands, 1 advisory hook. Seams: dev portal/SDK reference -> api-engineering, marketing copy/site design -> web-design, prose polish/ADRs -> ravenclaude-core/documentarian. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
